_comment: Synthetic fixture — pre_authorisations table and claim_utilisation table. pre_auth_no format: ^PA-\d{4}-\d{6}$. claim_utilisation tracks paid/pending disbursements for annual limit and lifetime limit checks.

pre_authorisations._scenario: A001 — pre-auth approved for Tan Wei Ming's pneumonia hospitalisation
A003 — pre-auth exists but claim halted at eligibility (waiting period). Included for completeness.
A004 — pre-auth for Ahmad's appendectomy at non-panel hospital

claim_utilisation._comment: Prior-year utilisation for HIC-2024-00123 (Tan Wei Ming) — used to compute annual_utilised and deductible_utilised for A001
Current-year utilisation for HIC-2023-00456 (Lim Jia Hui / Lim Kai Xuan) — used for A002 annual limit check
Existing paid claim for HIC-2024-00099 (Chen Mei Ling) — duplicate check for A005

deductible_ledger._comment: 2024 deductible usage for HIC-2024-00123 — does NOT carry over to 2025 benefit year
2025 deductible usage for HIC-2024-00123 — starts fresh; deductible_utilised = 0.00 for A001
deductible_ledger._note: No 2025 claims processed yet for this policy; deductible_utilised = 0.00

claims._comment: Existing claim record for A005 duplicate-check scenario. Same policy_no + incident_date + claim_type already has status=paid.
